description: This API reads IECS short circuit results from SCFILE and produces same IECS output report that was generated when SCFILE was created. SCFILE is read into PSSE memory to enable displaying IECS results onto slider diagrams. For this API to work properly, it is required that working case in PSSE memory should be the same Saved case that was used when creating the SCFILE. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.3. ierr = iecs_scfile(scfile)

parameters.name: scfile
parameters.description: Iec results (.sc) file. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for function not met.
three winding transformer SC results not available.
